data.title: 国际服联动签到活动「5 Days of Special Gifts with Love, Hatsune Miku」
data.summary: [Collab Celebration On-time Event] For the next 5 days, Miku is sending out special gifts to all Sen
data.body:
[Collab Celebration On-time Event]

For the next 5 days, Miku is sending out special gifts to all Senseis!
Don’t forget to check your mailbox daily!

🗓️Period: 6/14(Tue) – 6/18(Sat)
Details: https://nexon.link/8pf
